To: 2026-02-25 17:00:00+00:00

AIRSPACE CLSD Within CIRCLE RADIUS 200KM CENTRE 532200N0833200E.

FLW FLT NOT AFFECTED:

- VIP FLT AND FLT FOR THEIR SUPPORT,

- SKED INTL AND DOM FLT ALONG ATS RTE AND SKED ACFT ARR AND DEP

  TO/FROM CIVIL AVIATION Aerodrome.

- SPECIALLY DETACHED TO PROVIDE ASSISTANCE IN EMERGENCY SITUATIONS

  AND OTHER TASKS AND ACFT OUTSIDE SKED FLT BY COOR IN EACH CASE

  WITH DUTY OFFICER OF FEDERAL PROTECTION SERVICE OF RUSSIA IN

  BARNAUL CITY.
